background.endsPattern: Starting up http-server, serving .* through http://127.0.0.1:18080

tasks.label: iPhone Simulator starten
tasks.command: UDID=$(xcrun simctl list devices available | grep "iPhone 17 Pro (" | tail -n 1 | sed -E 's/.*\(([A-F0-9-]+)\).*/\1/'); if [ -z "$UDID" ]; then UDID=$(xcrun simctl list devices available | grep -E "iPhone .*\([A-F0-9-]+\) \((Shutdown|Booted)\)" | tail -n 1 | sed -E 's/.*\(([A-F0-9-]+)\).*/\1/'); fi; if [ -z "$UDID" ]; then echo "Kein iPhone-Simulator gefunden."; exit 1; fi; xcrun simctl boot "$UDID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; open -a Simulator --args -CurrentDeviceUDID "$UDID"; xcrun simctl bootstatus "$UDID" -b; echo "iPhone Simulator gestartet: $UDID"

tasks.label: OpenSprinkler App starten (iPhone)
tasks.command: UDID=$(xcrun simctl list devices | sed -n -E 's/^[[:space:]]*iPhone[^()]* \(([A-F0-9-]+)\) \(Booted\).*/\1/p' | head -n 1); if [ -z "$UDID" ]; then echo "Kein gebooteter iPhone-Simulator gefunden."; exit 1; fi; npx cordova prepare ios && xcodebuild -workspace platforms/ios/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination "id=$UDID" build "EMBEDDED_CONTENT_CONTAINS_SWIFT = YES" ALWAYS_EMBED_SWIFT_STANDARD_LIBRARIES=NO "LD_RUNPATH_SEARCH_PATHS = \"@executable_path/Frameworks\"" && xcrun simctl uninstall "$UDID" de.opensprinklershop.sprinklers >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && xcrun simctl install "$UDID" platforms/ios/build/Debug-iphonesimulator/OpenSprinklerASB.app && xcrun simctl launch "$UDID" de.opensprinklershop.sprinklers

tasks.label: iPhone Simulator stoppen
tasks.command: BOOTED_IPHONES=$(xcrun simctl list devices | sed -n -E 's/^[[:space:]]*iPhone[^()]* \(([A-F0-9-]+)\) \(Booted\).*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$BOOTED_IPHONES" ]; then for UDID in $BOOTED_IPHONES; do xcrun simctl terminate "$UDID" de.opensprinklershop.sprinklers >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; xcrun simctl shutdown "$UDID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; done; fi; pkill -x Simulator >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "iPhone Simulator gestoppt."
